G

game - package game
 
Game - Class in game
Handles the main game logic and player interactions.
Game(GameGUI) - Constructor for class game.Game
Constructs a new Game instance associated with the given GameGUI.
gameDone() - Method in class game.Game
Ends the game when the player leaves.
GameGUI - Class in game
GameGUI is a JPanel responsible for displaying and controlling the game interface.
GameGUI() - Constructor for class game.GameGUI
Constructs the GameGUI panel with the main frame reference.
getCoordinate() - Method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Returns the X coordinates of the body and the head images.
getCoordinate() - Method in class shot_boxes.informations.Informations
Returns the current coordinates of the item.
getCoordinate() - Method in class shot_boxes.questions.Questions
Returns the current X and Y coordinates of the question.
getCoordinate() - Method in interface shot_boxes.ShotBoxes
Returns the X and Y coordinates of the object.
getEasyInformations() - Static method in class shot_boxes.informations.Informations
Returns the list of easy informations.
getEasyQuestions() - Static method in class shot_boxes.questions.Questions
Returns the list of easy questions.

Returns the list of hard informations.
getHardQuestions() - Static method in class shot_boxes.questions.Questions
Returns the list of hard questions.
getHealth() - Method in class player.Player
 
getInfo() - Method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Returns the current Informations object assigned to this KnowledgeKeeper.
getInfo() - Method in class shot_boxes.informations.Informations
Returns the information text.

Returns the list of medium informations.
getMidQuestions() - Static method in class shot_boxes.questions.Questions
Returns the list of medium questions.
getName() - Method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers

Returns the current player instance.

getPoint() - Method in class shot_boxes.informations.Informations
Returns the point value of the information item.
getPoint() - Method in class shot_boxes.questions.Questions
Returns the point value associated with this question.
getProfessors() - Static method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Returns the list of all Professor instances.
getQuest() - Method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Returns the current Questions object assigned to this KnowledgeKeeper.
getQuest() - Method in class shot_boxes.questions.Questions
